node.title: Need Guidance: Not Getting Interview Calls Despite DSA Preparation

article.title: Need Guidance: Not Getting Interview Calls Despite DSA Preparation
article.content:
Hi Community,

I’m looking for some honest advice and guidance.

## Background
- I’m from a Tier 3 college  
- 1.5 years of work experience  
- Actively trying to switch to a product-based company  

## Preparation So Far
- Solved 400+ problems on LeetCode  
- Resume ATS score is around 93  
- Regularly applying to almost every relevant opening  

## Problem I’m Facing
Even after putting in consistent effort, I’m not getting enough interview calls. This has been very demotivating, and because of this, I’ve stopped practicing DSA for the past one month.

It feels like all the hard work is not translating into opportunities, which has made me question my approach.

## What I Want to Understand
- How do you effectively reach out to recruiters?  
- Does cold messaging on LinkedIn actually work?  
- What helped you get interview calls when you were in a similar situation?  
- Am I missing something important apart from DSA and resume optimization?

## Closing Thoughts
Right now, I feel stuck and have started losing hope. I genuinely want to regain the motivation to prepare again and move forward in the right direction.

Any advice, experiences, or suggestions from the community would really help.

Thanks for taking the time to read.

post.content: I am FAANG engineer with 4yoe in FAANG and still not getting response as i used to get, the market is very dead buddy!
You gotta keep drilling bud!! Don\'t get sadden.
Same here. I was wondering if it\'s because of my notice period (90). Also if you could share how you are applying that would be helpful for me.

Looks like January 2026 don\'t have much opportunities like previous year  , I am 9 YOE still getting no calls might be a recession in job market due to global instabilities  . Feb and March can bring in more calls probably , just be prepared  and hit with higher strike rates.
